changes_made: Changed k8s_persistent_volume_backup_enabled to k8s_pv_backup_enabled for brevity and consistency with common abbreviations.
Changed k8s_persistent_volume_snapshot_enabled to k8s_pv_snapshot_enabled for brevity and consistency with common abbreviations.
review_notes: The functions accurately map to the control CP-6 by ensuring backup and snapshot capabilities for etcd and persistent volumes. Naming was adjusted for brevity and consistency with common Kubernetes abbreviations.
naming_improvements: Use 'pv' instead of 'persistent_volume' for brevity and consistency with common Kubernetes abbreviations.
title: Alternate Storage Site
step1_reasoning: The control CP-6 - Alternate Storage Site requires ensuring that data is backed up and can be restored from an alternate location. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores cluster state, is backed up. Additionally, persistent volumes used by applications should have backup and snapshot capabilities enabled to ensure data can be restored in case of failure.
